name: Low Cal Crab Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 oz tub low fat cream cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the first 8 ingredients to a food processor and process until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a bowl and stir in the cheese and crab meat.
3. Cover and chill.
4. Sprinkle with paprika and serve with unsalted crackers or vegetables.
5. Makes: 3 1/2 cups
6. Calories per tablespoon: 18 (fat, .9 gram)
